sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63931" key="loutrofore/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λουτρο-φορέω</orth>, <sense id="n63931.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">carry water for bathing</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Harp.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
